summary: The legal tournament has at most 28 players and therefore at most five rounds, which is too narrow for an honest three-tier asymptotic verdict against complete outcome enumeration.

workload_bound.source_constraint: n is an integer from 2 through 28

replacement_checks.evidence: Memoization stores only distinguished-position states, and each round transition retains at most a quadratic set of winner-count pairs.
The certificate regression compares all 3654 legal (n, firstPlayer, secondPlayer) inputs with an independent positional tournament oracle.
